name: chyher--irene-ai-news
description: Daily AI news aggregator. Fetches latest AI-related content from HackerNews, GitHub Trending, ArXiv papers, and web search (Brave/Tavily). Use for: (1) Getting daily AI digest, (2) Staying updated with trending AI projects, (3) Discovering latest research papers, (4) Web search for breaking news. Triggers: ai news, daily digest, what's new in ai, tech news.
